headline: Ecolab Term Loan Fuels Frigeo Deal And Raises Leverage Questions
summary: Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) has entered into a large unsecured term loan credit facility. The facility is intended to finance the acquisition of Frigeo Holdings LLC. Proceeds will also be used to refinance associated debt linked to the transaction. Ecolab, trading at a recent share price of $274.8, is using this new term loan to support a meaningful acquisition in Frigeo Holdings LLC. With a 1 year return of 16.3% and a 3 year return of 71.2%, the stock has already rewarded long term holders, so...
